title: ADR-0017: @clerk/react client SDK dependency
verdict_summary: Proposed decision record (pending doc-ratify) that retroactively RATIFIES an already-shipped surface built under ENG-1387: the @clerk/react@6.12.2 client dependency plus its two adapter modules (ClerkAppProvider, ClerkLoginPage), all of which already EXIST in apps/client. The ADR contains no formal requirement ids and mandates no new build work — its decision points (1-4) are scoping/invariant constraints on existing code (sole-adapter seam, no client-side authority, version pin 6.12.2, single-route blast radius), not new features. The one forward-looking MUST ('real-tree provider-wiring tests required for any new Clerk-mounting route') is a going-forward testing policy, not a discrete build obligation, and the existing Clerk client login/exchange surface is already covered (feature-map lines 305 exchange, 676 shipped Clerk pipeline; FR-15 in covers-union). Zero build gaps.

components.name: @clerk/react@6.12.2 (client SDK dependency, apps/client/package.json)
components.quote: @clerk/react@6.12.2 added as a first-class client dependency (apps/client/package.json).

components.name: ClerkAppProvider (apps/client/src/features/clerk/clerk-app-provider.tsx)
components.quote: ClerkAppProvider (apps/client/src/features/clerk/clerk-app-provider.tsx) conditionally mounts Clerk's <ClerkProvider> around the /clerk route, gated by isClerkTenancy()

components.name: ClerkLoginPage (apps/client/src/pages/auth/clerk-login.tsx)
components.quote: ClerkLoginPage (apps/client/src/pages/auth/clerk-login.tsx) renders Clerk's own <SignIn> and <OrganizationList> components and calls Clerk's useAuth/useOrganization hooks in-browser
